# Add discounts

Reduce the amount charged to a customer by discounting their subtotal with coupons and promotion codes.

## Index

This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case:

- [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/discounts.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted)
- [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/discounts.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
- [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/discounts.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
